title: podman containers don't show progress bar
body:
### Issue Description

I am using [Arch Linux](https://hub.docker.com/_/archlinux/) container by podman and, after pulling its image, if I run it by:
```
podman run -ti --name al archlinux
```
once inside the container, if I run `pacman -Syy` command, it does not show the progress bar.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman pull archlinux`
2. `podman run -ti --name al archlinux`
3. `pacman -Syy`


### Describe the results you received

I receive the following output:
```
[root@1d9fb5ac38e9 /]# pacman -Syy
:: Synchronizing package databases...
 core downloading...
 extra downloading...
 ```
 but without progress bar.

### Describe the results you expected

A progress bar is expected to be shown.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Tested in an Arch Linux VM in VMware Workstation Pro in Windows 11 client.

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
Seems to be done that way on purpose...

/etc/pacman.conf
```
# Misc options
#UseSyslog
#Color
NoProgressBar
```

So not podman, but the `archlinux` image.
By commenting that line it works. Thank you.
